message:
Improve FCP core crates: error enrichment, mesh hardening, conformance expansion, and code formatting

fcp-core: enriched error.rs test coverage with multi-line struct
initialization formatting for all FcpError variants; expanded
provisioning.rs restructuring; improved connector_state, lifecycle,
lease, enrollment, capability, supply_chain, and zone_keys modules
with formatting and minor logic refinements.

fcp-mesh: hardened admission control, degraded-mode handling, device
management, node routing, planner placement logic, and symbol request
handling; mesh transport improvements.

fcp-conformance: expanded compliance checker and interop session
harness with additional validation paths and test scenarios.

fcp-e2e: expanded end-to-end test library with new compliance helpers;
algolia and asana compliance E2E tests significantly expanded; google
calendar and LLM router E2E tests updated.

fcp-crypto: ed25519, shamir, and error module formatting improvements.

fcp-protocol: control plane, FCPC/FCPS framing, session, and symbol
envelope formatting refinements.

fcp-sdk: ratelimit pool builder test formatting (method chaining
compacted), formatting/migration/retry/runtime/streaming module
improvements.

fcp-oauth: expanded OAuth1/OAuth2 token handling, error propagation,
and library root improvements.

fcp-sandbox: WASI isolation expanded with additional capability
gating; egress and sandbox formatting updates.

fcp-registry: expanded registry implementation (~100 lines).

fcp-ratelimit: backoff and header parsing improvements.

fcp-store: object store and error handling refinements.

Additional crate updates: fcp-async-core, fcp-audit, fcp-bootstrap,
fcp-cbor, fcp-cli repair, fcp-graphql schema, fcp-host budget,
fcp-manifest (lib + golden vector tests), fcp-raptorq encoding,
fcp-streaming (error/SSE/stream), fcp-tailscale (error/identity),
fcp-telemetry export, fcp-testkit (harness/fixtures/mock), fcp-webhook
(event/handler/provider).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -345,28 +345,61 @@ mod tests {
     #[test]
     fn error_debug_all_variants_contain_variant_name() {
         let variants: Vec<(&str, CryptoError)> = vec![
-            ("InvalidKeyLength", CryptoError::InvalidKeyLength { expected: 1, actual: 2 }),
-            ("InvalidSignatureLength", CryptoError::InvalidSignatureLength { expected: 3, actual: 4 }),
-            ("SignatureVerificationFailed", CryptoError::SignatureVerificationFailed),
+            (
+                "InvalidKeyLength",
+                CryptoError::InvalidKeyLength {
+                    expected: 1,
+                    actual: 2,
+                },
+            ),
+            (
+                "InvalidSignatureLength",
+                CryptoError::InvalidSignatureLength {
+                    expected: 3,
+                    actual: 4,
+                },
+            ),
+            (
+                "SignatureVerificationFailed",
+                CryptoError::SignatureVerificationFailed,
+            ),
             ("InvalidKeyId", CryptoError::InvalidKeyId("x".into())),
             ("AeadEncryptFailed", CryptoError::AeadEncryptFailed),
             ("AeadDecryptFailed", CryptoError::AeadDecryptFailed),
             ("HpkeFailed", CryptoError::HpkeFailed("y".into())),
             ("CoseFailed", CryptoError::CoseFailed("z".into())),
-            ("InvalidNonceLength", CryptoError::InvalidNonceLength { expected: 5, actual: 6 }),
-            ("KeyDerivationFailed", CryptoError::KeyDerivationFailed("w".into())),
+            (
+                "InvalidNonceLength",
+                CryptoError::InvalidNonceLength {
+                    expected: 5,
+                    actual: 6,
+                },
+            ),
+            (
+                "KeyDerivationFailed",
+                CryptoError::KeyDerivationFailed("w".into()),
+            ),
             ("InvalidPublicKey", CryptoError::InvalidPublicKey),
             ("InvalidSecretKey", CryptoError::InvalidSecretKey),
-            ("SerializationError", CryptoError::SerializationError("s".into())),
-            ("TokenValidationError", CryptoError::TokenValidationError("t".into())),
+            (
+                "SerializationError",
+                CryptoError::SerializationError("s".into()),
+            ),
+            (
+                "TokenValidationError",
+                CryptoError::TokenValidationError("t".into()),
+            ),
             ("TokenExpired", CryptoError::TokenExpired),
             ("TokenNotYetValid", CryptoError::TokenNotYetValid),
             ("MissingField", CryptoError::MissingField("f".into())),
         ];
 
         for (name, variant) in &variants {
             let debug = format!("{variant:?}");
-            assert!(debug.contains(name), "Debug for {name} missing variant name: {debug}");
+            assert!(
+                debug.contains(name),
+                "Debug for {name} missing variant name: {debug}"
+            );
         }
     }
